title: Dependency Rules
description: Dependency Rules descriptor (dependencyfile.json) defining dependency version rules per artifact and per branch.

artifacts.description: Default artifact rules. Branch rules inherit them for artifacts they do not declare themselves. Keys are artifact patterns such as 'org.springframework:*', 'spring-*', or '*'.

branches.description: Branch rules expressed through a branch or project-version pattern such as '3.5.x' or '2.*.x'.

artifactRule.description: An artifact rule: a generation string ('7.0.x'), an array of generations (['6.5.x', '7.0.x']), or an object carrying a display name and generations.

name.description: Friendly display name used in inspection messages instead of the artifact pattern.

generation.description: Project development line expressed as a version prefix: a major line ('6'), a minor line ('6.0' or '6.0.x'), or an exact version ('6.0.1'). '*' accepts any version.

generationLine.description: Project development line expressed as a version prefix: a major line ('6'), a minor line ('6.0' or '6.0.x'), or an exact version ('6.0.1').

generationArray.description: Permitted project development lines; a version matches when it falls within any listed generation. '*' is not allowed inside arrays.

upgrades.description: Upgrade strategies permitted on matching branches. Omitting the array or leaving it empty permits all strategies.

items.description: An upgrade strategy. Values are matched case-insensitively; unknown values are ignored.

artifacts.description: Artifact rules for branches matching this pattern. They take precedence over the default artifact rules; artifacts without a branch-level rule inherit the defaults. Keys represent artifact patterns such as 'org.springframework:*'.
